title: Command tree pruning (C5+C6+C7+C8+C9) — delete fab hooks (move installHooks to new file), strip fab config subcommands, fold fab scan → fab doctor --rescan (delete legacy helpers, keep runInitScan), hide plan-context-hint, wire fab config visible as rc.16 placeholder
description: Five command-tree edits batched (per task brief decomposition): C5 delete fab hooks (move installHooks + validateHookPaths to NEW packages/cli/src/install/hooks-orchestrator.ts per clarification 1, update 2 test imports + install.ts:18 import); C6 strip configCmd.subCommands.{hooks,install} (config.ts:99-152) → single placeholder run() printing t('cli.config.placeholder') with --target only; C7 delete scan.ts top-level (scanCommand at L286-L334) + delete legacy helpers (createScanReport, walkFiles, buildRecommendations, getReadmeQuality, matchesIgnorePattern at L63-L1559) + delete scan-edge-cases.test.ts entirely (pure clean-slate per clarification 8), KEEP runInitScan at L178-L280 + detectExistingLanguage at L629-L690 + __testing__ at L1566-L1584; C8 add meta.hidden:true to planContextHintCommand at plan-context-hint.ts:70-75 (citty 0.2.2 native support); C9 register configCmd into allCommands (index.ts:1-10). Net router: 7 entries → 5 entries [install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config] + plan-context-hint hidden (callable, not advertised). Update cli-surface.test.ts public-command-set assertion at L94-L103 (rotate: -scan, +config). Update docs/test-seed/cli.md §1 + README.md L12/L17. Delete parseClientFilter (config.ts:56-73) + its config-install.test.ts describe block per clarification 9. Commit: `refactor(rc15): command tree pruning — delete fab hooks, strip fab config subcommands, fold fab scan → fab doctor --rescan, hide plan-context-hint, wire fab config placeholder`

files.change: NEW file. Move installHooks (currently at packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts:106-281) + validateHookPaths (L156-L217) + any internal helpers needed (e.g. ENGLISH/CHINESE config templates referenced inside installHooks). Update internal imports as needed. Export `installHooks` and `validateHookPaths` as named exports. File header comment explains rc.15 relocation rationale: 'Pure orchestrator for hook+skill installation. Previously lived in commands/hooks.ts; relocated in rc.15 because commands/ is reserved for citty command wrappers and the `fab hooks` top-level command was deleted while the helper survives as install-stage infrastructure.'

DELETE entire file. installHooks + validateHookPaths now live at packages/cli/src/install/hooks-orchestrator.ts. The citty hooksCommand wrapper is dropped; the top-level `fab hooks` command ceases to exist.

Remove `hooks: () => import('./hooks.js').then(m => m.default)` line (file deleted); remove `scan: () => import('./scan.js').then(m => m.default)` (scanCommand deleted in C7); ADD `config: () => import('./config.js').then(m => m.default)` (C9). Final allCommands keys: install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config, plan-context-hint. plan-context-hint stays in allCommands (callable) but is hidden from --help via meta.hidden (C8 in plan-context-hint.ts).

files.target: L13 import of hooksCommand (delete — file gone), L56-L73 parseClientFilter (DELETE per clarification 9), L99-L152 configCmd subCommands block (strip), L105 hooks subCommand wiring (delete), L106-L150 inline install subCommand (delete), L156-L191 installMcpClients (KEEP — used by install.ts:1192)
files.change: Delete line 13 hooksCommand import; delete parseClientFilter function (L56-L73); replace configCmd default export to a single defineCommand with no subCommands — only args:{target: { type: 'string', description: t('cli.config.args.target.description'), valueHint: 'path' }} and a run() handler that prints `console.log(t('cli.config.placeholder'));`. Keep installMcpClients export intact (install.ts:1192 still imports it via `import * as configCommand`).

files.target: L286-L334 (scanCommand default export — DELETE), L63-L1559 (createScanReport + walkFiles + buildRecommendations + getReadmeQuality + matchesIgnorePattern — DELETE per clarification 8 + memory feedback_clean_slate.md), L178-L280 (runInitScan — KEEP), L629-L690 (detectExistingLanguage — KEEP), L1566-L1584 (__testing__ — KEEP), L1-L62 (file header + imports — TRIM unused)
files.change: Delete scanCommand default export (L286-L334); delete legacy v1 API block (createScanReport + walkFiles + buildRecommendations + getReadmeQuality + matchesIgnorePattern, L63-L1559); KEEP runInitScan (L178-L280; preserved per critical preservation constraint — install.ts:926 + 12 test cases depend on it), detectExistingLanguage (L629-L690; install.ts:19 imports), __testing__ exports (L1566-L1584; scan-builders.test.ts depends); trim unused imports in file header; update header comment to drop 'kept because callers depend on it' line for createScanReport; remove the `default export = scanCommand` line entirely

Add `hidden: true` to meta object. Becomes: `meta: { name: 'plan-context-hint', description: t('cli.plan-context-hint.description'), hidden: true }`. Citty 0.2.2 supports this natively (confirmed at node_modules/.pnpm/citty@0.2.2/.../index.d.mts L50-L56). Command stays callable; hidden from --help listing only.
DELETE entire test file. Per clarification 8 + feedback_clean_slate.md: pure clean-slate removal of the legacy scan API. Coverage was for createScanReport/walkFiles which no longer exist.

files.target: L7 parseClientFilter import + the 'client-aliases' describe block
files.change: Delete the parseClientFilter import at L7 + the entire 'client-aliases' describe block (per clarification 9 — orphaned after C6). KEEP the Codex TOML writer describe block (orthogonal to config subCommands).

files.target: L14 (scanCommand import — DELETE), L77-L88 (per-command snapshot driver), L94-L103 (public command set assertion)
files.change: Remove `import scanCommand from ...` at L14; add `import configCmd from '../src/commands/config.js'` at L14 (or appropriate position); update the per-command snapshot tuple list: remove ['scan', scanCommand], add ['config', configCmd]; update the public-command-set assertion at L94-L103 to expect exactly [install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config] (count 5; rotate scan→config per clarification 10)

files.target: L198-L235 (scan snapshot block — DELETE), add new config snapshot block
files.change: Delete the scan snapshot block (L198-L235); add config snapshot block (regenerated via `vitest -u`) — expected: { args: { target: {...} } } only (single arg + run() handler that prints placeholder)

files.target: L66-L71 scanCommand import + locale-snapshot capture block
files.change: Remove the scanCommand dynamic import + locale snapshot capture. Optionally add configCmd locale snapshot (similar pattern) to lock the placeholder message in en + zh-CN.
Add cli.config.placeholder = 'Config panel coming in rc.16 — edit fabric-config.json directly for now.'; add cli.config.args.target.description = 'Target project directory (defaults to cwd).'
Add cli.config.placeholder Chinese translation; add cli.config.args.target.description Chinese translation

Remove 'fab scan' bullet from public commands list; add 'fab config' bullet; mention 'fab doctor --rescan' as the replacement for the deleted fab scan command. Update L12: '公共命令面只保留 install/doctor/serve/uninstall/config' (drop scan, add config).

files.target: L9-L14 (Public commands listing), L17-L23 (Internal surface), L63-L68 (Out of Scope §4), L72-L73 (§5 source traceability)
files.change: Rotate scan→config in §1 Feature Surface (L9-L14); document fab doctor --rescan as replacement for fab scan; note in §4 Out of Scope that fab scan top-level was removed in rc.15; update §5 source-traceability map to point at hooks-orchestrator.ts for installHooks (no longer in commands/hooks.ts); document plan-context-hint as 'hidden top-level command, callable by hook scripts'

implementation: Read packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts in full to extract installHooks (L106-L140), validateHookPaths (L156-L217), and any helper functions/constants they depend on

Create packages/cli/src/install/hooks-orchestrator.ts; move installHooks + validateHookPaths + their internal helpers; export as named exports; update file-internal imports (relative paths shift one level up — e.g. '../install/skills-and-hooks.js' becomes './skills-and-hooks.js' if applicable)
Delete packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts entirely
Update packages/cli/src/commands/install.ts:18 import to '../install/hooks-orchestrator.js'
Update packages/cli/__tests__/hooks-install-validate.test.ts:22 import path
Update packages/cli/__tests__/integration/install-skills-and-hooks.test.ts:29 import path

Edit packages/cli/src/commands/config.ts: delete L13 hooksCommand import; delete L56-L73 parseClientFilter; rewrite configCmd default export (L99-L152) to a minimal defineCommand with meta + args:{target} + run() printing t('cli.config.placeholder'); KEEP installMcpClients at L156-L191 unchanged
Edit packages/cli/__tests__/config-install.test.ts: delete L7 parseClientFilter import + the 'client-aliases' describe block; keep Codex TOML describe block

Edit packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts: delete scanCommand default export (L286-L334); delete the legacy v1 API block (createScanReport L63 + walkFiles + buildRecommendations + getReadmeQuality + matchesIgnorePattern, contiguous deletion of L63-L1559 — verify exact boundary while editing); KEEP runInitScan (L178-L280), detectExistingLanguage (L629-L690), __testing__ (L1566-L1584); trim now-unused imports; remove `export default scanCommand` line
Delete packages/cli/__tests__/integration/scan-edge-cases.test.ts entirely
Edit packages/cli/src/commands/plan-context-hint.ts:70-75: add `hidden: true` to meta object
Edit packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts:1-10: remove `hooks` and `scan` entries from allCommands map; add `config: () => import('./config.js').then(m => m.default)` entry

Edit packages/cli/__tests__/cli-surface.test.ts:14: remove scanCommand import, add configCmd import; edit L77-L88 per-command snapshot driver to rotate scan→config; edit L94-L103 public command set assertion to expect [install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config]
Edit packages/cli/__tests__/i18n.test.ts:66-71: remove scanCommand dynamic-import block; optionally add configCmd parallel block for placeholder-message snapshot
Add cli.config.placeholder + cli.config.args.target.description keys to en.ts and zh-CN.ts
Edit packages/cli/README.md L12 + L17: drop scan, add config + doctor --rescan reference

Edit docs/test-seed/cli.md §1 (L9-L14), §1 Internal surface (L17-L23), §4 Out of Scope (L63-L68), §5 (L72-L73): rotate scan→config; add doctor --rescan note; update source traceability map for hooks-orchestrator.ts
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -u` to regenerate cli-surface.test.ts.snap (scan block deleted, config block added)
Run tsc/lint/vitest — fix until green; expect install integration tests still pass since installHooks is preserved

git add + commit with message: `refactor(rc15): command tree pruning — delete fab hooks, strip fab config subcommands, fold fab scan → fab doctor --rescan, hide plan-context-hint, wire fab config placeholder`

reference.pattern: Command + Helper duality pattern (exploration-command-tree-deps.json Pattern 1): /commands/*.ts files that mix citty defineCommand (delete) with pure helpers (preserve) get cleanly split. Helpers migrate to /install/ sibling directory matching existing skills-and-hooks.ts convention. The `meta.hidden: true` pattern (Pattern 3) uses citty 0.2.2 native support for hidden-but-callable. Stub-via-placeholder pattern (Pattern 5) for fab config: defineCommand with single run() printing i18n key.
reference.examples: See exploration-command-tree-deps.json clarification 1 option 0 (recommended) for hooks-orchestrator.ts pattern; clarifications 3-5 for fab config placeholder + parseClientFilter cleanup decisions

criteria: packages/cli/src/install/hooks-orchestrator.ts exists with installHooks + validateHookPaths named exports

packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts allCommands has exactly 6 keys: install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config, plan-context-hint (config replaces scan; hooks removed; plan-context-hint remains for hook scripts but is hidden)

packages/cli/src/commands/config.ts contains NO subCommands map; configCmd default export is a single defineCommand with meta + args:{target} + run() printing t('cli.config.placeholder'); parseClientFilter function deleted

packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts has NO default export; createScanReport + walkFiles + buildRecommendations + getReadmeQuality + matchesIgnorePattern are deleted; runInitScan + detectExistingLanguage + __testing__ remain as named exports
packages/cli/__tests__/config-install.test.ts does NOT contain 'client-aliases' describe block (parseClientFilter removed)
packages/cli/__tests__/cli-surface.test.ts L94-L103 asserts public command set === [install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config] (count exactly 5)
cli-surface.test.ts.snap does NOT contain a scan block; DOES contain a config block (single args.target + run() output snapshot)
en.ts AND zh-CN.ts both contain cli.config.placeholder and cli.config.args.target.description keys
Running `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs --help` lists exactly 5 commands: install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config (plan-context-hint hidden)
Running `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs plan-context-hint --help` still works (callable despite hidden)
Running `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs config` prints 'Config panel coming in rc.16 — edit fabric-config.json directly for now.'
Running `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs install <target>` still succeeds end-to-end (validates installHooks/installMcpClients/runInitScan all reachable via new paths)
`pnpm test` exit 0, `pnpm typecheck` exit 0, `pnpm lint` exit 0

rationale.chosen_approach: Single batch commit for all 5 command-tree edits because they share the snapshot file (cli-surface.test.ts.snap) and the index.ts router — splitting would force multi-commit snapshot regeneration churn. Move installHooks to NEW file in /install/ per clarification 1 (convention match). Pure clean-slate deletion of legacy scan helpers + scan-edge-cases.test.ts per clarification 8. Visible fab config with placeholder per clarification 4.
alternatives_considered: Keep hooks.ts as helper-only file (no relocation)
Hide fab config until rc.16 ships actual TUI
decision_factors: Single snapshot regeneration avoids inter-commit churn
Commands/ directory invariant (one command per file) preserved by relocating installHooks
Pre-user clean-slate enables aggressive helper deletion (memory feedback_clean_slate.md)
Visible config signals rc.16 ETA to users discovering the surface
rationale.tradeoffs: Bigger single commit (~10 files modified, 2 created/deleted) vs. 5 smaller commits. Mitigated by clear convergence criteria + per-file change descriptions. installHooks file relocation requires test import updates — sequencing matters within the commit (write hooks-orchestrator.ts BEFORE deleting commands/hooks.ts to avoid broken state mid-edit).

manual_checks: Run `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs --help` — verify lists [install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config] only (5 commands; no scan, no hooks; plan-context-hint hidden)
Run `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs plan-context-hint --help` — verify command still resolves (hidden ≠ deleted)
Run `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs config` — verify prints 'Config panel coming in rc.16 — edit fabric-config.json directly for now.'
Run `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs hooks --help` — expect citty 'Unknown command: hooks' error
Run `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs scan /tmp/test` — expect citty 'Unknown command: scan' error

Run `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs install /tmp/test` end-to-end — verify installHooks invocation from hooks-orchestrator.ts succeeds, installMcpClients from config.ts succeeds, runInitScan from scan.ts succeeds (validates all 3 preserved helpers reachable)
success_metrics: All tests pass: `pnpm test` exit 0 (including the rewritten cli-surface, hooks-install-validate, install-skills-and-hooks tests)
Type-check passes: `pnpm typecheck` exit 0 (no broken imports from hooks.ts deletion)
Snapshot diff: scan block removed (37 lines deleted from cli-surface.test.ts.snap); config block added (small new block); install args unchanged from TASK-001 baseline
unit: i18n.test.ts (scan locale block removed, config locale block added)
integration: scan-init.test.ts (untouched — runInitScan preserved; 12 call sites still pass)
